summary: Re-verified Phase 3 frontend after admin.tsx regression fix and kiosk.tsx icon fix. ALL acceptance criteria pass: /admin dashboard now renders RACCOURCIS section with PushOptIn banner ('Notifications bloquées — autorisez-les dans les réglages du navigateur.') and the 4 quick-action buttons (Réservations, Menu, Paramètres, App Fidélité ↗). All 3 navigation taps land on the correct routes (/admin-reservations, /admin-cms, /admin-settings). /admin-ads still renders the 'Diaporama publicitaire' screen with kiosk settings box and section groups (Club Fidélité 4, Expérience 4). /kiosk auto-rotating slideshow renders correctly with the new 'chevrons-left' Feather icon — no more invalid-icon console warning. Customer home / shows the 4-tab bottom bar (Accueil/Menu/Réserver/Compte). Only one residual warning remains: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' (pre-existing, already reported in iter7).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — emitted once on /kiosk render. Pre-existing, likely from expo-linear-gradient or react-native-safe-area-context internals. Not a blocker.

action_items: Optional: investigate the residual 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning (likely from a transitive dep on /kiosk). Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.tsx is 670+ lines — still close to the 700-line guideline. Future-proof by extracting CustomerCard / RewardsList / ScannerSection into separate components.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 regression closed. Admin dashboard on main subdomain renders correctly: RACCOURCIS label + PushOptIn banner + 4 quickGrid buttons (open-reservations-btn, open-cms-btn, open-settings-btn, open-loyalty-app-btn). Loyalty admin (isLoyaltyApp()===true) variant has not been re-verified in this iteration but the previously-working set (stats/staff/ads/kiosk) is still wired identically and is reached through the same outer `!customer` gate. Kiosk uses 'chevrons-left' Feather icon now and is warning-free for icons.
rca_of_issue: Iter7 regression RCA: outer guard `{isLoyaltyApp() && !customer && (...)}` at admin.tsx:265 hid the main-admin quick-action grid. FIX applied by main agent: outer guard reduced to `{!customer && (...)}` (line 265) and the scanner/search subtree gated by a nested `{isLoyaltyApp() && (...)}` (line 267). The quickGrid + PushOptIn now live OUTSIDE the loyalty gate but INSIDE the !customer gate, so both main and loyalty admins see their respective quick actions. Confirmed by playwright on https://denfert-pizzeria.preview.emergentagent.com/admin.
